creator: lucylangthorne55@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 172468
Patch for kodi from 16.0 to 16.1

This patch updates kodi from version 16.0 to 16.1 which was released April 24.

The accompanying FFmpeg version in the GH_TUPLE remains 16.0 (not 16.1) according to the source code at:

https://github.com/xbmc/xbmc/blob/16.1-Jarvis/tools/depends/target/ffmpeg/FFMPEG-VERSION
